data.title: Ethereum Foundation releases mandate: aims for extreme decentralization to ensure network continuity post cessation.
data.description: The non-profit organization aims to enhance the decentralization of Ethereum to a level where it could continue to operate effectively even without the foundation's presence.

data.title: Toll Brothers Unveils Two Brand-New Home Designs at Cross Kirkland Towns in Kirkland, Washington
data.description: Upscale townhouses now available at a topnotch location offering convenient access to the Cross Kirkland Corridor trail system.

data.title: Liquid Networx Wins Two Partner of the Year Awards at Fortinet Accelerate 2026
data.description: In San Antonio, Liquid Networx, a leading cybersecurity and managed services provider, was recently honored as the Engage Preferred Services Partner (EPSP) Partner of the Year in North America and the Unified SASE Partner of the Year for the third consecutive year by Fortinet. This makes Liquid the first partner to receive both accolades in a single year. The prestigious Fortinet Partner of the Year Awards celebrate outstanding partners and distributors globally. The recognition highlights Liquid Networx's consistent excellence in the industry.

data.title: Hockey Legend and BC High Alumnus Mike Sullivan Brings Home Milano-Cortina 2026 Gold
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Boston, Rocket Alumni Solutions, a top touchscreen software provider, celebrated Mike Sullivan '86, a Boston College High School (BC High) graduate. Sullivan led the USA Olympic Men's Hockey Team to a gold medal at the Milano-Cortina 2026 Olympics.

data.title: Celanese Stock Sees RS Rating Climb To 87
data.description: Celanese's Relative Strength Rating has surpassed the 80 level, reaching 87. This increase is a positive indicator for the company's stock performance.
